title: Fresh Weather
description: Less obstuctive, more realistic rain, snow and a custom sun
body:
## Weather Enhancement 
**Immerse yourself in a Minecraft world where weather feels more natural and visually stunning. This resource pack is designed to enhance your experience by refining the way rain, snow, and sunlight appear, creating an atmosphere that draws you deeper into your adventures.**

### Bringing Depth and Clarity to Every Drop
Elevate your Minecraft atmosphere with subtle yet immersive weather enhancements. This resource pack refines rain and snow textures by adding transparency and depth, creating a more realistic and visually pleasing environment. Splash particles have been transformed to be more real instead of the lose blue pixels in vanilla, adding an atmospheric touch to wet surfaces. Plus, the sun’s texture has been refreshed for a cleaner, brighter look that complements the enhanced weather effects and clouds perfectly.

Whether you’re exploring vast biomes or building your dream world, this pack brings subtle yet impactful improvements that elevate your gameplay. Dive into a Minecraft experience where weather doesn’t just happen—it feels alive and part of the world around you.

[Here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-weather/gallery) you can see it for your self in the gallery.
